name: com.wagenheimer.rewiredhelper
description: Input-type detection and UI helper layer on top of Rewired: tracks mouse/touch/controller state, drives cursor visibility, routes Escape/Return to the right UI target, and exposes optional hooks (IUiBlocker, IModalStackProvider, IControllerHelpGate) so any game can wire it in without hard dependencies. Includes a ready-to-use modal dialog stack (ModalDialog/ModalDialogStack).
